case_title: LEE, ROBERT vs. ROGERS, TOM et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - REST. OF PREMISES AT 1537 NFRANKLIN, #301, S.F, CA. - RENTS WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES - WRIT MAY ISSUE 9-10-93, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 9-20-93 - NO FURTHER STAYS - MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS - DEF. WARRANTS THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS - PL. RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT & LAST MO. RENT - ANY POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, TOM DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROGERS, TOM ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROGERS, TOM
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ROBERT COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, TOM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1537 FRANKLIN ST, #301, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-20-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS TO BE GRANTED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. DEF. WARRANT THERE AR NO OTHER OCCUPANTS. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
